title: SailPoint Discloses GitHub Repository Hack
rssSummary: SailPoint notified the SEC that hackers exploited a vulnerability in a third-party application to access some of its GitHub repositories.

title: SailPoint GitHub repo hit by third-party cyberattack
rssSummary: SailPoint says GitHub repo breach exposed no customer data or production systems.

title: Identity security firm SailPoint discloses GitHub repository breach
rssSummary: SailPoint disclosed a GitHub repository breach on April 20. The company contained the incident and said no customer data was affected.
